subcodes.title: Words to Miss Boylan, spoken on 1908-10-02
subcodes.first_line: Tell the believers I send them my greetings and love, that I love them very much; that they must occupy themselves with the thought of the eternal world
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
